sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GST 2.0 - Resetting the Indian Economy
feed.summary: GST 2.0 is about more than slashing rates. By fixing inverted duty structures in sectors such as textiles and fertilisers and by streamlining input tax credit flows, it seeks to clear long-standing bottlenecks that have choked efficiency and liquidity. These reforms come at a critical juncture.
